_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to use interaction skills to discuss opinions about texts, analysing the purposes and effects of text structures and language features in group discussions.

_source.w: We are learning to use interaction skills to discuss opinions about texts, analysing the purposes and effects of text structures and language features in group discussions.
y: At this level, discussion becomes a tool for collaborative intellectual inquiry and critical analysis.
Being able to analyse texts through discussion helps us develop and refine our interpretations.
These interaction skills prepare us for the academic, professional and civic discussions we will participate in.
eg: We lead and participate in discussions that analyse how text structures and language features achieve particular effects.
We present well-supported opinions about texts and engage constructively with opposing views.
We use discussion as a thinking tool — developing our analysis through the exchange of ideas.
We evaluate the quality of arguments made in discussion, including our own.
We facilitate discussions that draw out diverse perspectives and deepen collective understanding.
We reflect on how discussion has refined or changed our analysis of a text.
